case_title: FRANK JAMES BOUTTE JR ET AL VS. FLORICEI SONGALIA

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOVEMBER 24, 2020 AT 10:00 A.M. DEPT. 506.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,900.00 FILED BY BOUTTE JR, FRANK JAMES MIBONSTEEL, RENANTE AS TO DEFENDANT SONGALIA, FLORICEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUTTE JR, FRANK JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SONGALIA, FLORICEI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2020 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-24-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK JAMES BOUTTE, JR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLORICEI IS NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-24-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANK JAMES BOUTTE JR. IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RENANTE MIBONSTEEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT FLORICEI SONGALIA IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ERIFANA KHAN. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. IT IS SUGGESTED THAT PARTIES ENGAGE IN A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BEFORE THE NEXT HEARING. THE DEFENDANT'S WITNESS INFORM THE CLERK THAT THEY ARE EMPLOYEES OF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY AND THEY BELIEVE THE CORRECT DEFENDANT-PARTY IS SLEEP TIGHT INC (PEST CONTROL). MS. KHAN AND MS. SONGALIA VOLUNTEERED TO GIVE SLEEP TIGHT THE PLAINTIFF'S CONTACT INFORMATION (WITH PLAINTIFF'S APPROVAL). MR. BOUTTE WAS ADVISED TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE IF HIS CLAIM IS SATISFIED BEFORE MAR-24-2021. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FRANK JAMES BOUTTE JR. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF RENANTE MIBONSTEEL IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT FLORICEI SONGALIA WITH WITNESS DEFENDANT'S SUPERVISOR AT THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
